message:
Fix CI: add bun install step, use local wasm-opt instead of npx

wasm-opt npm binary wasn't found because devDependencies weren't
installed before build. Add bun install to both CI jobs.

files.patch:
@@ -20,6 +20,9 @@ jobs:
         with:
           version: 0.15.2
 
+      - name: Install
+        run: bun install
+
       - name: Build
         run: bun run build
 
@@ -40,6 +43,9 @@ jobs:
         with:
           version: 0.15.2
 
+      - name: Install
+        run: bun install
+
       - name: Build
         run: bun run build

@@ -24,7 +24,7 @@
   },
   "scripts": {
     "build:zig": "zig build -Doptimize=ReleaseSmall",
-    "build:opt": "npx wasm-opt -Oz --strip-producers --strip-target-features dist/engine.wasm -o dist/engine.wasm --enable-simd --enable-bulk-memory --enable-nontrapping-float-to-int --enable-sign-ext --enable-mutable-globals",
+    "build:opt": "wasm-opt -Oz --strip-producers --strip-target-features dist/engine.wasm -o dist/engine.wasm --enable-simd --enable-bulk-memory --enable-nontrapping-float-to-int --enable-sign-ext --enable-mutable-globals",
     "build:types": "bun x tsc --emitDeclarationOnly",
     "build:js": "bun build src/js/index.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm --minify --sourcemap=external && bun run build:types",
     "build": "bun run build:zig && bun run build:opt && bun run build:js",
